title: Do
questions: Do you like watching to TV? Why?
Do your parents make you study hard?
Do you find Harry Potter interesting? Why?
Do your friends make you laugh?
How do they make you laugh?
Do your teachers give you lots of homework?
Do you listen to music often?
Do you go to the cinema with your friends?
Do you want to be a doctor?
Do you think you are tall?
Do you know any famous people?
Do you play computer games? What games?
Do you spend much time with your family?
Do your friends make fun of you?
Does your best friend like the same things as you?
